title: derris caudatilimba
intro: Derris caudatilimba, also known as the Caodatilimba, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of rotenone and other alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Derris caudatilimba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to the potential toxicity of its active compounds.
